top_signals.title: UK financial regulators to begin overseeing Critical Third Parties announced by HM Treasury
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England, the Prudential Regulation Authority and the Financial Conduct Authority will start overseeing the first Critical Third Parties on Monday 13 July 2026, following designation by HM Treasury.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/07 -  Bank of England Levy: Notification Document Levy Year 2026/27
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Drop After Chip Selloff, Oil Gains: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks edged lower after a selloff in chipmakers dragged down Wall Street as investors questioned whether massive artificial-intelligence investments can justify lofty valuations. Oil climbed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Letter from the Governor to Joe Powell MP
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Update on the Digital Gilt Instrument (DIGIT) pilot issuance
top_signals.summary: The Chancellor announced that DIGIT will be issued by Q1 2027, and the government is taking steps to prepare for potential future issuances. HSBC and LSEG have signed an MoU to develop connectivity together to support investor access.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Public Service Pensions and Judicial Offices Act: Amending Directions - July 2026
top_signals.summary: Amendments to Treasury Directions made under the Public Service Pensions and Judicial Offices Act 2022 in relation to the McCloud remedy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Commission provides guidance to Google for AI interoperability on Android and sharing of Google Search data under the Digital Markets Act
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission has issued two sets of binding specification measures to Google under the Digital Markets Act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan looks to strengthen rules in bid to curtail passive smoking
top_signals.summary: The panel, which has been reviewing measures against secondhand smoking, stopped short of strengthening regulations on heated tobacco products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Windows 11 24H2 Home and Pro reach end of support in 90 days
top_signals.summary: Microsoft announced on Wednesday that systems running Windows 10 Enterprise LTSB 2016 and Home and Pro editions of Windows 11 24H2 will stop receiving updates in three months. [...]

top_signals.title: Big Banks’ Profits Surge After a Red-Hot Quarter on Wall Street - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Big Banks’ Profits Surge After a Red-Hot Quarter on Wall Street  WSJ
